hero.subtext: Leading teams through the architecture of transformation.
hero.rightBody: Bring plans, people, and progress together so your team can focus on outcomes—not overhead. NAVI keeps change visible, accountable, and on track.

about.heading: About Us
about.lead: We build the operating system for change—not another project tracker.
about.body: NAVI helps leaders and teams replace scattered updates with a single narrative: what is changing, why it matters, and who does what next. From strategy to execution, you get clarity without the noise.
about.testimonialQuote: NAVI gave our leadership team one story for transformation—finally everyone pulled in the same direction.

howItWorks.heading: How It Works

steps.title: Audit & Analyze
steps.body: Map stakeholders, constraints, and readiness so you know what to tackle first—and what to defer.

steps.title: Design Roadmaps
steps.body: Sequence initiatives with clear owners, milestones, and measures everyone can follow.

steps.title: Execute & Iterate
steps.body: Run the plan, capture learnings, and adjust without losing sight of the goal or your people.

howItWorks.gettingStartedVideoSubtext: Watch a short walkthrough of NAVI—set up your workspace and run your first change plan with confidence.

resources.pageIntro: Articles and updates from the NAVI team—guides, ideas, and stories on navigating change.

items.title: Why change needs a single narrative
items.excerpt: How leadership teams align faster when everyone sees the same story for transformation.

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We take data protection seriously. NAVI is designed with security in mind—from how we handle contact inquiries to how we plan for enterprise-grade controls. Our full policy explains what we collect, why we collect it, and how you stay in control.

contact.heading: Get in Touch
contact.subtext: Tell us about your organization—we'll get back to you shortly.
